import re, unicodedata, json, math, difflib

AR_DIACRITICS = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0610, 0x061A+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0670, 0x0670+1)) + '\u06d6\u06d7\u06d8\u06d9\u06da\u06db\u06dc\u06df\u06e0\u06e1\u06e2\u06e3\u06e4\u06e7\u06e8\u06ea\u06eb\u06ec\u06ed'
def strip_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in AR_DIACRITICS)

def normalize_ar(s):
    s = s.replace('ٱ', 'ا')
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = s.replace('ٰ','')  # dagger alif
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)  # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    s = s.lower()
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    return s

def search_quran(query):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    hits = []
    for i, rec in enumerate(quran_data):
        text = rec['ayah_text']
        nt = normalize_ar(text)
        if all(tok in nt for tok in nq.split()):  # rough containment
            hits.append((i, rec, nt))
    return hits

def search_quran_contains_any(query):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    tokens = nq.split()
    hits = []
    for i, rec in enumerate(quran_data):
        nt = normalize_ar(rec['ayah_text'])
        if any(tok in nt for tok in tokens):
            hits.append((i, rec, nt))
    return hits

query = "وَلا تَقُل لَّم أَجِدْ شَيْئًا"
hits = search_quran(query)
len(hits)

def search_hadith_exact(query):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    hits = []
    for rec in hadith_data:
        text = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ""
        nt = normalize_ar(text)
        if nq in nt:
            hits.append((rec, text))
    return hits

def search_hadith_tokens(query):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    tokens = nq.split()
    hits = []
    for rec in hadith_data:
        text = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ""
        nt = normalize_ar(text)
        if all(tok in nt for tok in tokens):
            hits.append((rec, text))
    return hits

    sims=[]
    for rec in hadith_data:
        text = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ""

    sims_sorted = sorted(sims, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
